reportOverview.referenceContext: rCRS-or-GRCh38-chrM-derived synthetic fixture with a public Sequencing.com sample PDF plus MedlinePlus, MITOMAP, and 1000 Genomes background references
sectionsUnavailable: Authenticated Sequencing.com marketplace detail-page extraction is not available yet.
No calibrated haplogroup probability model is supplied with this fixture.
No exact migration path, homeland, family match, or autosomal ancestry model is supplied.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived maternal haplogroup H1a1 call is available. This describes one maternal line only.
resultRows.sourceLabel: MedlinePlus genetic ancestry testing / mitochondrial DNA
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Mitochondrial DNA ancestry follows the maternal line and does not represent all ancestors, ethnicity percentage, or identity.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The public sample PDF shows a report flow with How this works, Your Maternal Ancestry, and Details sections.
resultRows.description: The sample-backed output structure is used as a formatting target, not as the local fixture's haplogroup result.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The report should explain the result first, then give maternal-line context and limitations in plain English.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The public sample PDF visibly demonstrates a Haplogroup L deep-time maternal-line narrative.
resultRows.description: This sample row is documented separately from the local derived H1a1 call.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The Haplogroup L content is an observed sample-report example, not a claim about the local fixture's maternal haplogroup.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A summary-level H1a1 defining-marker context row is available; individual mtDNA variants are not emitted.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Reference databases support context and provenance, but they do not turn this local fixture into exact migration or homeland certainty.

maternalLineageSummary.scope: This result is limited to mtDNA maternal-line ancestry context.
maternalLineageSummary.plainEnglishMeaning: The maternal line is one inherited path through your family tree. It is not a summary of all ancestors, overall ethnicity, nationality, community identity, or family relationships.

whatThisDoesNotMean: This is not an autosomal ethnicity percentage.
This does not identify a precise homeland, tribe, community, or living relatives.
This is not a health or mitochondrial disease report.
This does not provide paternal-line ancestry or family matching.

references.title: Mitochondrial Ancestry DNA Report sample report
MedlinePlus Genetics: pros and cons of direct-to-consumer genetic testing

genotypeSummary.observedValue: summary-level defining marker match; individual mtDNA variants omitted
public sample report demonstrates Haplogroup L output structure separately from the local H1a1 fixture

missingInputs: Authenticated marketplace detail-page extraction has not been completed.
No calibrated haplogroup caller output, tree version, or call-quality metric is supplied.
No autosomal ancestry model, Y-DNA paternal-line model, exact homeland model, or family-matching data is supplied.
uncertainty: A derived mtDNA haplogroup provides maternal-line context only and should not be used as an exact population, ethnicity, or identity label.
The local fixture uses summary-level evidence for validation; it is not a complete haplogroup-calling pipeline.
The public sample PDF demonstrates output structure and visible sample narrative; it is not a personal result for this fixture.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data is not included.
The report does not emit raw mtDNA variant lists.
Authenticated Sequencing.com marketplace detail-page extraction is still pending.
